facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 642 reviews. On a street full of tourist traps.

Buổi Sáng 부이상 on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo keeps pulling real numbers because the food is real. Vietnamese breakfast and beyond, done the way locals expect it. No gimmicks.

This is the kind of spot you walk past, then regret. Don't walk past it.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
